title: 17-year-old student drowns at Pathankayam waterfalls in Kozhikode
summary: A 17-year-old boy, Shabeel, drowned at Pathankayam waterfalls. He was with two friends who raised the alarm when he went missing. His body was recovered before rescue services arrived.

title: Kannur family’s Ooty trip ends in tragedy; three, including boy, killed near Gundlupet
summary: Three family members from Kannur, including a three-year-old, died in a collision with a truck near Gundlupet en route to Ooty, with one survivor in intensive care.

title: Summer showers till May 8; yellow alert in 4 Kerala districts today
summary: Kerala anticipates widespread rain and thundershowers until May 8th, with yellow alerts issued for heavy rainfall and thunderstorms. Authorities caution of potential disruptions.

title: ബംഗാളില്‍ വോട്ടെണ്ണലിന് മണിക്കൂറുകള്‍ക്ക് മുന്‍പ് റീപോളിംഗ് പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ച് തിരഞ്ഞെടുപ്പ് കമ്മീഷന്‍

title: Orthodox, Jacobite factions clash over church festival in Ernakulam; cops register case
summary: A dispute over an additional priest at a church festival led to a clash between Orthodox and Jacobite factions, with pepper spray allegedly used, resulting in a police case being registered.

title: IUML declares victory in Kasaragod, flex boards name Kallatra Mahin as ‘MLA-elect’
summary: Indian Union Muslim League workers in Kasaragod declared their candidate MLA-elect before counting, displaying confidence with provocative slogans and citing exit polls.

title: Woman bites municipal employee, creates ruckus at Mukkam Municipality Office
summary: A woman attacked a municipal employee over a pension issue, biting and injuring her and two others, causing panic; police intervened, but no case was registered.
